goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called kohinoor. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 12:45 on saturday. If the booking fails how about 11:45. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse. The hotel should have a star of 4. Make sure you get whether they have free parking and postcode

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you tell me if there is a restaurant named Kohinoor in Cambridge?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes there is one listing, it serves indian food,it is in the centre,and has a cheap price. Would you like me to give you the information?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Just go ahead and book a table for 7 on Saturday at 12:45 please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I apologize, I am unable to book at that time. Is there another time you'd like me to try for?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: 11:45 will be Ok.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I found Indian restaurant called Kohinoor 74 mill rd ,which is in center . Is that good for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes that is perfect. Can I get the reference number please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The reference number for your reservation at Kohinoor is HB7JSPFK. Your table will be reserved for no longer than 15 minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need to find a 4 star guesthouse that is located in the north, can you help me book one please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Avalon has good reviews and is in the moderate price range would you like to book that?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you let me know whether they have free parking and what the postcode is?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, the Avalon has free internet but no free parking. The postcode for them is: cb43pd. The archway house has both free internet and free parking.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for your help!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No problem! Enjoy your trip here in Cambridge!

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve australian food and should be in the centre. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 16:00 on wednesday. If the booking fails how about 15:00. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the same price range as the restaurant. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day. If the booking fails how about saturday. Make sure you get the reference number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to find out if there are any places to dine that serve Australian food in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, there are not.  Do you want me to run another search?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What about an expensive restaurant in the centre?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure I have many types of cuisine to choose from: African, French, Asian Oriental, British, European..any preference?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd be interested in any serving British food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay, how about midsummer house restaurant located at midsummer common?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Sounds great. Please book me a table for Wednesday at 16:00 for 5 people.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance:
Booking was successful. The table will be reserved for 15 minutes.
Reference number is : W3Y6OCL8.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, I'm also looking for a hotel with free parking and wifi. Can you find me one?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure i will find you one thanks i lot and welcome again

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called maharajah tandoori restaurant. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 19:30 on saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the moderate price range. The hotel should be in the type of hotel. If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day. Make sure you get the reference number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for a place called maharajah tandoori restaurant. Do you know it? It's a restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, it's a luxurious place on the west side. Would you like the number, or a reservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I would like to make a reservation for 6 people at 19:30 this Saturday. Could I also get the reference number?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes! Your all set confirmation number is QX0059LN, anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I was hoping to find a hotel that is 4 star.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: What part of town are you looking at staying in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I don't care, just as long as it's in the moderate price range.

turns.speaker: system

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are all set, the reference number is OEX7Z2S0, can I assist with anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That is all I need.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for calling and if you need anything else don't hesitate to call again.  Enjoy your dinner and hotel stay!

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the centre. The hotel should be in the type of hotel. If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi. Make sure you get price range, address, and phone number. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the same area as the hotel. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 13:45 on tuesday. If the booking fails how about 12:45. Make sure you get the reference number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need a hotel at the center of town to stay in

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Cityroomz hotel is in the center of town. Would you like to book it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, that would be great.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: When would you like to book that for?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like to book it for tonight, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have received your booking and you are all set. Enjoy your stay.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like to know the price range, address, and phone number please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It's moderately priced, so you don't have to worry about breaking the bank. And it is located at sleeperz hotel, station road. You can give them a call at 01223304050.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay thanks. I am also looking for a restaurant. Can you help me?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Of course, there are 110 restaurants in town. Do you have a desired food type or price range?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like it to be in the expensive price range and in the same area as the hotel.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, there are 33 expensive restaurants in the town centre. Do you have a cuisine preference?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No preference however I just need something for 13:45 on Tuesday

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: How does the Bedouin sound? They serve African cuisine. Also how many people would you like to book the table for?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need a table for five people please.  I don't care which kind of food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am sorry Tuesday at 13:45 is unavailable.  Is there another day or time that will work for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: 12:45 will work for me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are booked for 12:45 and your reference number is 54D9CRE9. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Not at this moment. Thank you so much for all of your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are quite welcome. Enjoy the remainder of your stay!
